auth.label: API Key
auth.description: OCR.space API key sent with the apikey header. Get it from the API signup page: https://ocr.space/ocrapi

actions.name: extract_text
actions.description: Extract text from a public image/PDF URL or uploaded transit file by calling OCR.space.

url.description: The public image or PDF URL to parse with OCR.space.

fileId.description: The transit file identifier returned by POST /api/files.

name.description: Optional filename override to send to the provider.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type override to send to the provider.

file.description: A local transit image or PDF file to upload to OCR.space.

language.description: The OCR language code to send upstream.

detectOrientation.description: Whether OCR.space should auto-detect page orientation.

scale.description: Whether OCR.space should scale the input image.

isOverlayRequired.description: Whether OCR.space should return word-level overlay metadata.

isTable.description: Whether OCR.space should apply table-aware parsing when possible.

ocrEngine.description: The OCR engine version to request from OCR.space.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for extracting text with OCR.space. Provide exactly one of url or file.

text.description: The concatenated OCR text from all successful pages.

pageNumber.description: The 1-based page number in the OCR result.

parsedText.description: The parsed text returned for this page.

fileParseExitCode.description: The page-level OCR parse exit code returned by OCR.space.

anyOf.description: The page-level error message, when present.
The page-level error details, when present.
Optional OCR text overlay metadata returned by OCR.space.

pages.description: The normalized OCR page results returned by OCR.space.

ocrExitCode.description: The top-level OCR exit code returned by OCR.space.

isErroredOnProcessing.description: Whether OCR.space marked the request as errored during processing.

anyOf.description: The top-level OCR error message, when present.
The top-level OCR error details, when present.

processingTimeInMilliseconds.description: The OCR processing time in milliseconds returned by OCR.space.

outputSchema.description: The normalized OCR text extraction result returned by OCR.space.

actions.name: get_conversion_stats
actions.description: Fetch OCR.space conversion statistics for the current month or the previous month.

startDate.description: Set to lastMonth to fetch the previous month's conversion statistics.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching OCR.space conversion statistics.

period.description: The logical period represented by the returned conversion counts.

outputSchema.description: The normalized OCR.space conversion statistics returned by OCR.space.
